data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_YouveMadeItT: Aak!\nYou've made it to me?\lHmmm... You're sharp!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_AllNightToPl: It took me all night to plant all those\ntrees...\pYou're almost my equal in greatness by\none, two, three, four, five, six places!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_AllNightToMa: It took me all night to make the maze...\pYou're almost my equal in greatness by\none, two, three, four, five places!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_19C3A7: It took me all night to bring in those\nboulders...\pYou're almost my equal in greatness by\none, two, three, four places!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_AllNightToSh: It took me all night to shove in those\nboulders...\pYou're almost my equal in greatness by\none, two, three places!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_AllNightToMa: It took me all night to make MECHADOLLS\nand another to think up the quiz...\pYou're almost my equal in greatness by\none, two places!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_AllNightToIn: It took me all night to install\nthe doors...\pYou're almost my equal in greatness!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_AllNightSett: It took me all night setting up arrows...\pYou're my equal in greatness!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_AllNightPoli: It took me all night polishing floors...\pYou're above me in greatness!\nPossibly...
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_FountainOfId: Wh-what should I do?\nMy fountain of ideas for tricks has\lrun dry...\pPerhaps it is time I toured the country\non a quest to devise new tricks...
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_DefeatedMeTa:
I hate to admit defeat, but you have
bested me!\pStill, you must have been reeled in by
my charisma for you to visit me again\land again. Yes, you must have!\pBut that has nothing to do with my
losing!\pIn recognition of the friendship
between you, the driven, and the genius\lthat is myself, I demand that you take\lthis keepsake!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_NoRoomInPC: What? No room in your PC?\nWhat am I to make of that?\pI wish I could say that, but I am much\ntoo kind and caring, so come back later!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_LeavingOnJou: ... ... ... ... ... ...\pI am leaving on a journey of discovery.\nA quest in search of new tricks.\pI wish that you will one day visit and\nentertain me again.\pAnd now, farewell!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_NoRoomForThi: What? Have you no room for this?\nWhat manner of items do you carry?\pBut fine, since you've reached me,\nyour reward will be with me till later.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_MakeNewTrick:
Scrub that smug smirk from your face!
It's much too early to think you've won!\pI'll make new tricks to stump you, I will.
You may mock me only when you're done.\pCome back for the next exciting
installment!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_YoureIgnorin: Now, now! You're ignoring me now?\nNow that, I consider heartbreaking!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.UnknownString_819CAD1: {PLAYER} wrote down the secret code\non the door.\p“TRICK MASTER is fabulous.”\n... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pThe lock clicked open!
